glosses.ar: تمثال نصفي; الجزء العلوي من الجسم
glosses.id: patung setengah badan; bagian atas tubuh

sentences.target: Garde ton buste droit, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ɡaʁd tɔ̃ byst dʁwa, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Garde ton buste droit, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ɡaʁd tɔ̃ byst dʁwa, sil tə plɛ/
translations.es: Mantén el tronco recto, por favor.
translations.it: Tieni il busto dritto, per favore.
translations.pt: Mantém o tronco direito, por favor.
translations.he: בבקשה תשמור על פלג הגוף העליון ישר.
translations.vi: Làm ơn giữ thân trên thẳng.
translations.el: Κράτα τον κορμό σου ίσιο, παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Hold overkroppen din rett, vær så snill.
translations.id: Tolong jaga tubuh bagian atas tetap lurus.
translations.ja: 上半身をまっすぐに保ってください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'garder'; head verb issuing a command; takes 'buste' as direct object and 'droit' as object complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'buste' to indicate possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'Garde'; here refers to the body (torso).
Adjective, masculine singular; object complement describing the desired state of 'buste'.
Subordinating conjunction (elided before vowel), opening the conditional clause in the fixed polite expression 's'il te plaît'.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'plaît' within the polite expression.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object, dative); complements 'plaît' ('pleases you').
3rd person singular present of 'plaire'; verb of the conditional clause; part of the fixed polite formula.

sentences.target: J'ai mal au buste depuis ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒe mal o byst dəpɥi sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: J'ai mal au buste depuis ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒe mal o byst dəpɥi sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: My chest hurts since this morning.
translations.es: Me duele el pecho desde esta mañana.
translations.de: Mir tut die Brust seit heute Morgen weh.
translations.it: Mi fa male il petto da stamattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从今天早上开始胸口疼。
translations.yue: 我從今朝早開始胸口痛。
translations.ru: У меня с сегодняшнего утра болит грудь.
translations.pt: Meu peito dói desde hoje de manhã.
translations.vi: Từ sáng nay ngực tôi đau.
translations.nl: Mijn borst doet pijn sinds vanmorgen.
translations.uk: У мене від сьогоднішнього ранку болить грудна клітка.
translations.hu: Fáj a mellkasom ma reggel óta.
translations.hi: आज सुबह से मेरे सीने में दर्द है.
translations.pl: Boli mnie klatka piersiowa od dzisiejszego rana.
translations.el: Με πονάει το στήθος από το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg har hatt vondt i brystet siden i morges.
translations.id: Dada saya sakit sejak pagi ini.
translations.sv: Jag har haft ont i bröstet sedan i morse.
translations.ro: Mă doare pieptul de azi dimineață.
translations.cs: Od dnešního rána mě bolí hrudník.
translations.da: Jeg har haft ondt i brystet siden i morges.
translations.fi: Minulla on ollut rintakipua tästä aamusta lähtien.
translations.ja: 今朝から胸が痛いです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun, elided before vowel; subject of 'ai'.
1st person singular present of 'avoir'; main lexical verb in the idiom 'avoir mal'; governs 'mal' and the PP 'au buste'.
Common noun used in the idiom 'avoir mal'; internal object indicating pain.
Fused preposition + definite article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the body-part complement of 'mal'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' specifying the locus of the pain.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'matin'.
Common noun; head of the temporal PP 'depuis ce matin'.

sentences.target: On travaille le buste à la salle.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁavaj lə byst a la sal/

translations.fr: On travaille le buste à la salle.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁavaj lə byst a la sal/
translations.en: We’re training upper body at the gym.
translations.es: Entrenamos la parte superior del cuerpo en el gimnasio.
translations.de: Wir trainieren den Oberkörper im Fitnessstudio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在健身房练上半身。
translations.ru: Мы тренируем верхнюю часть тела в спортзале.
translations.pt: Treinamos a parte superior do corpo na academia.
translations.he: אנחנו מתאמנים על פלג הגוף העליון בחדר הכושר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tập thân trên ở phòng gym.
translations.ar: نحن نتدرب على الجزء العلوي من الجسم في الصالة الرياضية.
translations.nl: We trainen het bovenlichaam in de sportschool.
translations.uk: Ми тренуємо верхню частину тіла в спортзалі.
translations.hi: हम जिम में ऊपरी शरीर का व्यायाम करते हैं.
translations.pl: Trenujemy górną część ciała na siłowni.
translations.el: Γυμνάζουμε το πάνω μέρος του σώματος στο γυμναστήριο.
translations.id: Kami melatih bagian atas tubuh di gym.
translations.ro: Antrenăm partea superioară a corpului la sală.
translations.cs: Trénujeme horní část těla v posilovně.
translations.ja: ジムで上半身を鍛えています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (colloquially 'we'); controls 3rd person singular agreement on 'travaille'.
3rd person singular present; main verb; transitive, taking 'le buste' as direct object; 'à la salle' as locative PP.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'buste'.
Common noun; direct object of 'travaille'; here refers to the body (torso) targeted in training.
Preposition introducing a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the locative PP 'à la salle'.

translations.en: Look at this bust at the museum.
translations.es: Mira este busto en el museo.
translations.de: Schau dir diese Büste im Museum an.
translations.zh-Hans: 看看博物馆里的这座半身像。
translations.yue: 睇吓博物館入面呢座半身像。
translations.ru: Посмотри на этот бюст в музее.
translations.he: תסתכל על פסל החזה הזה במוזיאון.
translations.vi: Nhìn bức tượng bán thân này ở bảo tàng.
translations.ar: انظر إلى هذا التمثाल النصفي في المتحف.
translations.nl: Kijk naar deze buste in het museum.
translations.uk: Подивись на цей бюст у музеї.
translations.hu: Nézd meg ezt a mellszobrot a múzeumban.
translations.hi: संग्रहालय में इस अर्धमूर्ति को देखो.
translations.pl: Spójrz na to popiersie w muzeum.
translations.el: Κοίτα αυτήν την προτομή στο μουσείο.
translations.nb: Se på denne bysten på museet.
translations.id: Lihat patung setengah badan ini di museum.
translations.sv: Titta på den här bysten på museet.
translations.ro: Uită-te la acest bust în muzeu.
translations.cs: Podívej se na tuhle bustu v muzeu.
translations.da: Se på denne buste på museet.
translations.ja: 博物館でこの胸像を見て。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular; head verb commanding the addressee to look; takes 'ce buste' as direct object and a locative PP.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'buste'.
Common noun; direct object of 'Regarde'; here refers to a sculpted bust.
Fused preposition + definite article; introduces the locative PP 'au musée'.
Common noun; head of the locative PP; denotes the place where the action occurs.
